data.title: The US Solana spot ETF saw a net inflow of $5.37 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the Solana spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $5.37 million yesterday (November 28th, Eastern Time). The SOL spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Grayscale SOL ETF (GSOL), with a net inflow of $4.33 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $77.83 million. This was followed by the Fidelity SOL ETF (FSOL), with a net inflow of $2.42 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $32.3 million. The 21Shares SOL ETF (TSOL) experienced a single-day net outflow of $1.38 million, bringing its historical total net outflow to $27.6 million. As of press time, the Solana spot ETF has a total net asset value of $888 million, a net asset value ratio of 1.15%, and a cumulative net inflow of $619 million.

data.title: Metis, Derive, and Mantle Lead November’s Layer-2 Surge as Activity Accelerates
data.description:
Layer-2 networks posted one of their strongest months of 2025, with explosive growth across emerging platforms and steady expansion among established rollups. New data highlights a broad acceleration in transaction activity, signaling rising adoption in DeFi, gaming, social applications, and cross-chain communication.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/metis-derive-and-mantle-lead-novembers-layer-2-surge-as-activity-accelerates/

data.title: Japan draws closer to overhauling its crypto rulework
data.description:
Japan is gearing up for a major crypto regulatory reset. The Financial Services Agency (FSA) is deliberating on a legal amendment that could reclassify crypto from a payment tool to a “financial product” in order to boost investor protection amid crypto accounts quadrupling over five years. On November 26, the FSA working group reviewing crypto […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-overhauls-crypto-rulework/

data.title: Circle has minted another 500 million USDC, bringing the total issuance with Tether to $18.25 billion since October 11.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Circle has just minted another 500 million USDC. Data shows that since the market correction on October 11th, Tether and Circle, the two major stablecoin issuers, have cumulatively minted stablecoins worth a total of $18.25 billion. Large-scale stablecoin minting is often interpreted by the market as a potential signal of capital inflows or increased purchasing power.

data.title: LBank launches a zero-fee spot trading promotion, simultaneously offering a 100% enhanced bonus.
data.description: According to official sources, LBank launched its zero-fee spot trading promotion on November 29th. During the promotion period, all spot trading pairs on the platform are free of charge. Furthermore, users who deposit funds into their contract accounts during the promotion period can receive a 100% enhanced bonus, achieving the double benefit of "zero fees + deposit rewards".

data.title: Ethereum tripling its gas limit is the ‘floor, we can go higher’ — Sassano
data.description:
Ethereum educator Anthony Sassano said Ethereum’s gas limit could climb beyond three times next year, with some developers pushing for a fivefold increase.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethereum-gas-limit-increase-transactions-fees-anthony-sassano?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fttl%3D0%26__%3D1764383828632&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Coinbase includes Rayls (RLS) in its listing roadmap
data.description: According to official sources, Coinbase has added Rayls (RLS) to its listing roadmap. The actual trading launch date will be announced later, pending the completion of market-making support and technical integration.

data.title: An address deposited 5,000 ETH into Binance, bringing the total deposits over the past two weeks to over 13,400 ETH.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address that bought WBTC at a low price four years ago and took profits at a high price in July this year (profiting $107 million) deposited 5,000 ETH into Binance 10 hours ago, worth approximately $15.36 million. This address has cumulatively deposited 13,403.28 ETH into exchanges over the past two weeks, with a total value of $41.06 million. Currently, this address still holds 15,000 ETH and has interactions with addresses associated with Galaxy Digital; the ownership of the wallet cannot be confirmed at this time.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a net inflow of $22.68 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, XRP spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $22.68 million yesterday (November 28th, Eastern Time). The XRP spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ), with a net inflow of $10.68 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $85.22 million. The second largest was the Canary XRP ETF (XRPC), with a net inflow of $9.07 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $344 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs was $688 million, with an XRP net asset ratio of 0.52%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $667 million.

data.title: Cango's total Bitcoin holdings have surpassed 6,900, with 129.1 BTC mined this week.
data.description: Cango, a Bitcoin mining company listed on the NYSE, announced on the X platform that it mined 129.1 BTC this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to over 6,900, currently at 6,902.5.

data.title: São Paulo Launches Blockchain-Based Microloan Pilot for Farmers
data.description: According to Odaily, São Paulo, Brazil's economic hub, has announced the launch of a pilot project utilizing blockchain technology to provide microloans to farmers. The initiative aims to enhance the efficiency and transparency of credit distribution while reducing administrative costs. This effort is designed to facilitate easier access to financial support for agricultural producers, particularly small and medium-sized farmers. This move signifies a further exploration by local Brazilian authorities into applying Web3 technology to the real economy and improving the agricultural financing environment.

data.title: Belarus establishes registry of criminal encrypted wallets to strengthen anti-money laundering oversight.
data.description: Vasily Gerasimov, Chairperson of the State Control Committee (SCC), announced at a plenary meeting of the Eurasian Group (EAG) that Belarusian authorities have established and are updating a dedicated register to record cryptocurrency wallets involved in criminal proceeds. This database is part of a comprehensive mechanism for the seizure of illicit digital funds introduced in preparation for the upcoming FATF assessment. Gerasimov noted that regulators are introducing new financial investigation mechanisms to quickly detect the flow of criminal funds. Furthermore, regulations concerning cryptocurrency transaction taxation and ensuring transparency in the digital asset sector have also been passed.

data.title: Visa Expands Stablecoin Settlement Network Across CEMEA as USDC Adoption Surges
data.description:
Visa is accelerating its stablecoin strategy with a major expansion into cross-border settlements across Central and Eastern Europe, the Middle East, and Africa (CEMEA).
source: https://www.ethnews.com/visa-expands-stablecoin-settlement-network-across-cemea-as-usdc-adoption-surges/

data.title: São Paulo, Brazil, will launch a pilot project for blockchain-based microloans for farmers.
data.description: São Paulo, Brazil's economic center, has reportedly announced a pilot project to provide microloans to farmers using blockchain technology. The initiative aims to improve the efficiency and transparency of credit allocation while reducing administrative costs, thereby helping agricultural producers, particularly small and medium-sized farmers, access financial support more easily. This move marks a further exploration by Brazilian local governments in applying Web3 technology to the real economy and improving the agricultural financing environment. (CoinDesk)

data.title: A whale deposited $13.12 million USDC into Hyperliquid to hoard ENA.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale address deposited $13.12 million USDC into Hyperliquid over the past four days to accumulate ENA on the spot market. As of now, this whale has spent $7.25 million to buy 25.56 million ENA, and still holds $5.78 million USDC in its account, with the buying activity continuing.

data.title: BlackRock Receives Large Crypto Transfers from Coinbase
data.description:
BlackRock receives 300 BTC and 16,629 ETH from Coinbase, marking significant institutional inflow in crypto management.
source: https://coincu.com/news/blackrock-coinbase-crypto-transfers/

data.title: UK orders crypto platforms to log all user transactions starting 2026
data.description:
UK crypto platforms will be required to report all user transactions from 2026.
